label: Asset Managers (ROE-on-equity-float focus)

deferred_concepts.reason: Assets-under-management growth — supplemental disclosure, not standard XBRL
Fee revenue / average AUM — supplemental disclosure
Performance vs management fee mix — supplemental disclosure

notes: Asset managers are equity-light, fee-revenue businesses; EBITDA is a reasonable cash-earnings proxy unlike banks. ROE captures the operating leverage on regulatory capital float. AUM-growth (deferred) is the leading indicator that drives forward fee revenue but isn't in standard XBRL. priceToSales absent because 'sales' is not the dominant value driver — fee margins on AUM matter more, and AUM isn't disclosed at concept level.
